title: Decide patch vs navigate for filter vs detail
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/catalog_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.CatalogLive). The catalog has a filter nav ("all", "books", "music") and each item is a clickable row leading to a detail page /catalog/:id. Filter links must use <.link patch={~p"/catalog?category=#{c}"}> to stay in the same LiveView. Row links must use <.link navigate={~p"/catalog/#{item}"}> to cross to a different LiveView. Must not mix up patch vs navigate. Use :for for both lists.
tier_rationale: Requires correct decision at each link site. Canonical discrimination rule.
research_citation: dev.to 'When to use navigate, patch, href'
